subject: Fermi GBM trigger 686350260/221001869 is not a GRB
body:
S. Poolakkil (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 686350260/221001869
at 20:50:55.74 UT on 1 October 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a SGR."
